mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, book_id AS bookId, quantity, stock, created_at as createdAt
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, book_id AS bookId, quantity, stock, created_at as createdAt FROM sales WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales (user_id, book_id, quantity, stock, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{quantity}, #{stock}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
